---
title: "About Me"
---

::: {.hero-banner .text-center}

<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Carter King" class="rounded-circle mb-3" width="160">

<h1>Carter King</h1>

<p class="lead">Building AI tools for teams.</p>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/carter-king1/" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/ck22coding" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub
</a>

:::

## What I Do

I build AI infrastructure — middleware, context systems, developer tooling. Currently working on [Locker](projects/locker.qmd), enterprise skill middleware that lets teams share AI knowledge securely, and [ContextOS](projects/contextos.qmd), a context engineering platform that makes AI actually work for a whole company. I've also built 40+ Claude Code skills spanning research, shipping, QA, and knowledge capture.

## Background

BYU Marriott School of Business, Strategic Management (Class of 2028). Before going deep on AI, I worked in investment banking (Vermilion Rock Advisors), private equity (Ironclad Growth Partners), and valuation (Colliers International). That experience taught me how firms think about competitive advantage — now I build tools that create it.

This summer I'm joining **BYU Sandbox**, a venture-scale startup program, to take a product from idea to launch.

## Skills

**AI & Developer Tools**

- Claude Code, MCP servers, prompt engineering, agentic workflows
- FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Railway, Vercel

**Languages**

- English, Croatian, Serbian, Bosnian

## What's Next

Shipping ContextOS. Growing Locker. Building at BYU Sandbox this summer.
